name: Mini Morsel Shortbread Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a large mixing bowl, beat together the butter and sugar until creamy.
3. Beat in the egg and vanilla extract.
4. Gradually add the flour to the mixture and stir in gently.
5. Stir in 1 cup of mini chocolate chips.
6. Pour the batter into an ungreased 13 x 9-inch pan.
7. Bake for 30 to 33 minutes, or until the top begins to brown.
8. Immediately sprinkle the remaining 1 cup of mini chocolate chips over the top.
9. Let the treat stand for 5 minutes, or until the chips become shiny and soft.
10. Spread the chocolate evenly over the top.
11. Allow it to cool for 10 minutes.
12. Cut into 1 ¼ inch squares once cooled. This recipe makes about 3 dozen.
